items.title: American investment in Liga MX: The growing appeal...
items.summary: Liga MX is "the least explored, biggest opportunity in global sports," according to one Mexican club owner, and American investors are taking notice.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Walker Homers Twice, Astros Beat Cubs 3-0 For Chicago's 7th-Straight Loss
items.summary: Christian Walker homered twice with three RBIs as the Houston Astros beat Chicago 3-0 to extend the Cubs’ losing streak to seven, their longest skid in four years.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: IPL 2026 Orange and Purple Cap race: Sooryavanshi, Archer, Tyagi could shoot up
items.summary: Here's how things stand on the Orange and Purple Cap tables at IPL 2026 with only two games left in the league stage, both to be played on double-header Sunday
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
